source.title: New Zealand Gazetteer
source.custodian: Ngā Pou Taunaha o Aotearoa New Zealand Geographic Board / Toitū Te Whenua LINZ

selection.localityRule: Official Locality, or Unofficial Recorded Locality with a numeric label hierarchy
selection.prominenceRule: numeric label hierarchy of 10 or lower
selection.coordinates: NZ application bounds, rounded to 5 decimal places
selection.duplicateRule: prefer a numeric label hierarchy, then name
selection.modifications: Filtered by place type, status, and application bounds; duplicate alternatives resolved; coordinates rounded to 5 decimal places.
